title: Sharowing's Starter Bags
description: A Mod that add (Highly unethical) Starter Bags To The Game!
body:
![lgo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60a4606bd636078daffc2ede8f9b8b5712f6ac65.png)

![descrip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09d9e349d0afe2b195ec7fe883b7420591bc2fc.png)

# This Mod Adds
- **Three different starter bags** that you get when you **join** a **new world**,
  
for the people that find the first grindy parts of the game boring.

### **THE STARTER BAGS** :
- **The Basic Starter Bag** -
  a starter bag that just removes that first hour of gameplay of just getting started, but nothing much 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

###   THE LOOT :

  - 1 iron chestplate
 - 1 iron boots
 - 1 iron pickaxe
- 1 stone axe
- 1 stone sword
- 16 cooked porkchops
- 1 blast furnace
- 1 smoker
- 1 crafting table
- 2 barrels
- 32 oak wood
- 32 cobblestone
- 32 charcoal 


</details>


- **The Full Starter Bag** - 
  a starter bag that i would already consider unethical, with it containing enough equipment that for some people is already enough to beat the ender dragon.
  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

###   THE LOOT :

  - 1 iron chestplate
 - 1 iron boots
- 1 iron leggings
- 1 iron helmet
 - 1 iron pickaxe
- 1 iron axe
- 1 iron sword
- 1 iron hoe
- 1 iron shovel
- 32 cooked beef
- 2 blast furnaces
- 2 smokers
- 1 crafting table
- 2 barrels
- 64 oak wood
- 64 cobblestone
- 32 charcoal 
- 32 torches
- 1 bed


</details>

- **The Overpacked Starter Bag** - 
  a starter bag that is insanely overpowered, containing a full set of diamond tools and armor, and way to much equipment to start the game off with, HIGHLY UNETHICAL.
 <details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

###   THE LOOT :

  - 1 diamond chestplate
 - 1 diamond boots
- 1 diamond leggings
- 1 diamond helmet
 - 1 diamond pickaxe
- 1 diamond axe
- 1 diamond sword
- 1 diamond hoe
- 1 diamond shovel
- 1 Infinite Bucket Of Galk (Infinite Milk and Golden Carrots)
- 5 blast furnaces
- 5 smokers
- 1 crafting table
- 6 barrels
- 128 oak wood
- 128 cobblestone
- 64 charcoal 
- 64 torches
- 1 bed
- 1 enchantment table
- 30 bookcases
- 30 books
- 1 anvil



</details>

### **THIS MOD DOES NOT WORK ON MULTIPLAYER AND WILL NOT BE UPDATED TO WORK ON MULTIPLAYER EVER.**
